subcodes.first_line: This is the ninth day of Riḍván, when the All-Merciful hath drawn nigh unto the seat of him whom He loveth and who loveth Him, as a grace from His presence. Verily, He is He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم التاسع من الرضوان قد اقبل الرحمن الی مقر من احبه و یحبه فضلا من عنده انه لهو
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @power of prayer, @high station of the true believer, @spiritual transformation, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
